     ╚════════════════════════╝

       hello           world

        ▄██▄            ▄██▄

╔══════════════════════════════════╗
║        coding convention         ║
╚══════════════════════════════════╝

legend:
  ^  salutation: a greeting addressed at the world.
  ii hello: the act of greeting.
  ii world: the recipient.
  _  coding convention: the canonical first program in any toolchain.

───────────────── built with _ii^ ──
